segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Hello everyone.
segments.zh:
大家好。很高兴看到这么多市民来参加我们关于在Nunston郊区规划的新住宅开发项目的介绍会。我是Mark Reynolds，是开发项目的通讯经理。

首先，我简要介绍一下我们的开发计划。大家肯定想知道为什么我们选了这个地点。目前这里用于农业，就像Nunston周边大部分土地一样。但由于Nunston新建了工业中心，该地区对员工住房的需求很大，很多员工目前通勤距离很长。当然，还有一个事实是，我们距离国际机场只有20分钟车程，虽然这确实方便，但并不是我们选址的主要标准。我们更看重的是，15公里外有一家优秀的医院，而一所大型中学距离更近。这个地点的一个缺点是坡度很陡，但我们在规划中已经考虑到了这一点，所以应该不会成为大问题。

我们的计划收到了很多积极反馈。人们喜欢多样化的住房类型和价格，以及从开发项目开车很短距离就能到乡村。我们特别高兴的是，很多人喜欢开发项目的布局设计，大多数人认为它总体上给人留下了好印象，并与自然景观特征很好地融合，同时保护了场地上的树木和野生动物。有些人提到希望看到更多为骑行者提供的设施，我们会考虑这一点，但总体反馈是，开发项目的设计和设施使其成为一个各年龄段的人都能快乐生活的地方。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's good to see that so many members of the public have shown up for our presentation on the new housing development planned on the outskirts of Nunston.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'm Mark Reynolds and I'm Communications Manager at the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'll start by giving you a brief overview of our plans for the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: So one thing I'm sure you'll want to know is why we've selected this particular site for a housing development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: At present it's being used for farming, like much of the land around Nunston.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: But because of the new industrial centre in Nunston, there's a lot of demand for housing for employees in the region, as many employees are having to commute long distances at present.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Of course, there's also the fact that we have an international airport just 20 minutes' drive away, but although that's certainly convenient, it wasn't one of our major criteria for choosing the site.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We were more interested in the fact that there's an excellent hospital just 15 kilometres away, and a large secondary school even closer than that.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: One drawback to the site is that it's on quite a steep slope, but we've taken account of that in our planning so it shouldn't be a major problem.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We've had a lot of positive feedback about the plans.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: People like the wide variety of accommodation types and prices, and the fact that it's only a short drive to get out into the countryside from the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We were particularly pleased that so many people liked the designs for the layout of the development, with the majority of people saying it generally made a good impression and blended in well with the natural features of the landscape, with provision made for protecting trees and wildlife on the site.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Some people have mentioned that they'd like to see more facilities for cyclists, and we'll look at that, but the overall feedback has been that the design and facilities of the development make it seem a place where people of all ages can live together happily.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh:
好的。现在我把规划图投到屏幕上。你们可以看到，南边以主干道为界，这条路通往Nunston。另一条边界是伦敦路，位于开发项目的西侧。开发项目内将有大约400栋房屋和3栋公寓楼。

还会有一所面向11岁以下儿童的学校。如果看地图底部的南入口，有一条路从那里直通开发项目内部。学校就在那条路上，在第二个左转路口拐角处。

规划了一个大型体育中心，配备室内外活动设施。它将位于开发项目的西侧，就在从伦敦路分出的那条路的下方。

会有一个诊所，居民有健康问题可以去那里。你们能看到地图顶部附近的湖吗？诊所就在湖的下方，在一排房子的右侧。

还会有一个面向所有年龄段居民的社区中心。在开发项目的东北侧，将有一排专为65岁以上居民设计的房屋，社区中心将与这些房屋相邻。

我们也没有忘记购物。开发项目的两个入口之间将有一个超市。我们计划保留伦敦路附近的三棵大树，超市就在这些树的南边。

计划为年幼儿童建一个游乐场。如果看从南入口向上的路，你会发现它在顶部向左弯曲，游乐场就在那个弯道处，可以欣赏到湖景。

好的，现在有人……

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: So I'll put a map of the proposed development up on the screen.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You'll see it's bounded on the south side by the main road, which then goes on to Nunston.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Another boundary is formed by London Road, on the western side of the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Inside the development there'll be about 400 houses and 3 apartment blocks.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There'll also be a school for children up to 11 years old.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: If you look at the South Entrance at the bottom of the map, there's a road from there that goes right up through the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The school will be on that road, at the corner of the second turning to the left.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: A large sports centre is planned with facilities for indoor and outdoor activities.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This will be on the western side of the development, just below the road that branches off from London Road.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There'll be a clinic where residents can go if they have any health problems.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Can you see the lake towards the top of the map?

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The clinic will be just below this, to the right of a street of houses.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There'll also be a community centre for people of all ages.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: On the northeast side of the development, there'll be a row of specially designed houses specifically for residents over 65, and the community centre will be adjoining this.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We haven't forgotten about shopping.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There'll be a supermarket between the two entrances to the development.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We're planning to leave the three large trees near London Road, and it'll be just to the south of these.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's planned to have a playground for younger children.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: If you look at the road that goes up from the South Entrance, you'll see it curves round to the left at the top, and the playground will be in that curve, with nice views of the lake.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: OK, so now does anyone …

items.prompt: What are the TWO main reasons why this site has been chosen for the housing development?

pairs.note: 原文直接提到工业中心导致住房需求，是选址原因之一。
原文明确说医院是主要考虑因素，对应题干原因。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到两个主要原因：工业中心带来的住房需求，以及附近有优质医院。题干问选址原因，直接对应这两点。

items.prompt: What are the TWO main reasons why this site has been chosen for the housing development?

pairs.note: 'main reasons' 同义替换为 'major criteria'，表示主要原因/主要标准。
题干和原文中完全相同的短语，直接定位。
'chosen for' 同义替换为 'choosing the site'，表示选择地点。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的 'main reasons' 和 'chosen for' 在原文中找到对应的 'major criteria' 和 'choosing the site'，从而定位到选择该地点的两个主要原因：新工业中心带来的住房需求和附近有优质医院及中学。

items.prompt: Which TWO aspects of the planned housing development have people given positive feedback about?

pairs.note: 题干中的housing development在原文中简化为development，是同义替换。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问人们给予积极反馈的两个方面，原文中直接出现'positive feedback'，后面列举了多个设施，但需要从选项中判断哪些是积极反馈的内容。注意题干中的'aspects'对应原文中的设施名称。

items.prompt: Which TWO aspects of the planned housing development have people given positive feedback about?

pairs.note: 题干中的'housing development'在原文中简化为'development'，指同一事物。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问人们给予积极反馈的两个方面，但原文中并没有直接列出哪些方面得到了积极反馈。实际上，这道题需要从整个对话中推断，但根据提供的定位句，没有明确提到'positive feedback'。因此，定位句可能不完整或需要更多上下文。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的词，直接定位。
题干和原文完全相同的方位词，直接定位。
题干和原文完全相同的动词，表示紧邻关系。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问社区中心的位置，原文提到在东北侧，与老年住宅相邻，因此定位到G。

pairs.note: 题干和原文中都是 playground，直接对应。
题干描述位置，原文直接说 playground 在 curve 里。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 playground 的位置，原文最后一句提到 playground 在道路弯曲处（curve），直接定位到 C 选项附近。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的词，直接定位

pairs.q: at the corner of the second turning to the left
pairs.p: at the corner of the second turning to the left
pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的短语，直接定位

paraphrase.explain: 题干问学校的位置，原文中明确提到学校在从南入口进去的路上的第二个左转拐角处，因此定位到D选项。

pairs.note: 题干和原文都是 school，直接对应。

pairs.q: at the corner of the second turning to the left
pairs.p: at the corner of the second turning to the left
pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问学校的位置，原文提到学校在从南入口进入后的第二条左转路的拐角处，直接对应。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的词，直接定位。

pairs.q: road that goes up from the South Entrance
pairs.p: road that goes up from the South Entrance
pairs.note: 题干描述与原文完全一致，帮助定位道路。

pairs.q: curves round to the left at the top
pairs.p: curves round to the left at the top
pairs.note: 题干描述与原文完全一致，指出具体位置。

paraphrase.explain: 题干描述 playground 位于从 South Entrance 向上的路在顶部向左弯曲处，原文逐字对应，直接定位到 H 位置。

pairs.note: 题干和原文中都是'playground'，直接对应。
题干描述位置时用了'in that curve'，原文中也是完全相同的短语。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问playground的位置，原文最后一句提到'playground will be in that curve'，直接对应。
